mapper.select: SELECT * FROM compare_target WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE compare_target SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_count = #{errorCount}, warn_count = #{warnCount}, info_count = #{infoCount}, files_scanned = #{filesScanned}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
